title: juniperus coreana var. rigida
intro: Juniperus coreana var. rigida, also known as the Korean Juniper or Rigida Juniper, is a variety of juniper tree native to Korea, characterized by its needle-like leaves and conical shape. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Juniperus coreana var. rigida include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and reduce bloating. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and berries are typically dried and used in teas, infusions, or as a topical application to harness its medicinal properties.
